entries.title: Frontier lab publishes new agentic-coding eval results
entries.author: @example
entries.blurb: Why it matters: benchmark deltas like this shift which model teams standardize on for agent stacks; expect procurement questions within the quarter.

entries.title: Chromium ships native agent-permission surface behind a flag
entries.author: @example
entries.blurb: Why it matters: browsers becoming the OS for agents makes permission UX the new security boundary — directly relevant to IoT-style consent failures we've seen before.

entries.title: npm supply-chain compromise hits popular build plugin
entries.author: @example
entries.blurb: Why it matters: third incident this quarter in the same dependency class; teams vibe-coding with agents inherit these transitively and rarely audit lockfiles.
